bias_checklist_draft.survivorship: Panel: Sharadar SEP bars (close+closeadj+volume) for the union of quarterly PIT top-119 members 1998-12→2026-06, delisted included; universes from DAILY marketcap quarter-end cross-sections. Delisted handling: bars run through each name's final trading day; 0 symbol(s) marked price-return-only (dividends missing): none.
bias_checklist_draft.look_ahead: Structural: universe snapshots read only same-day rows; select() sees bars trimmed to the signal date. No in-study tuning; parameters are Delphi's live frozen values; 3 cells enumerated in the prereg. Event feeds (if any) route through PITEventFeed keyed on public dates.
bias_checklist_draft.selection: No in-study tuning; parameters are Delphi's live frozen values; 3 cells enumerated in the prereg. The population/universe rule and every cell were enumerated in the prereg before any panel data was pulled; nothing was added after results were seen.
bias_checklist_draft.multiple_testing: n_trials=3 enumerated this study; house counter hypotheses_ever=96. Observed Sharpe 0.15 must clear expected max Sharpe 0.85 under 3 null trials (deflated-Sharpe bar), not zero.
bias_checklist_draft.overfitting: Parameters per cell fixed by prereg; No in-study tuning; parameters are Delphi's live frozen values; 3 cells enumerated in the prereg. Sharpe 0.15 with bootstrap 95% CI [-0.21, 0.52]; parameter_cliff_report on the grid distinguishes plateaus from isolated peaks before any cell is believed.
bias_checklist_draft.costs_liquidity: CostModel commission 0.0bps + slippage 5.0bps per side, min ticket $25.0; realized annual turnover 20.00x, cost drag 200bps/yr. Survivor reruns at 2x slippage required before any verdict.
bias_checklist_draft.small_n: n_obs=6913 daily returns; Sharpe 0.15 (bootstrap 95% CI [-0.21, 0.52]); total return 34.3%. Forward validation still requires >=20 graded paper trades on the shrunk mean regardless of in-sample n.
